issues.description: First effect trigger is wrong. Text describes a reactive ability when opponent's effect would remove your Character (base cost ≤6), not OnPlay. Should be Counter or Trigger on opponent's removal effect, not OnPlay.

Action is incomplete. FlipLife only specifies count=1, but missing the conditional check: this action only occurs IF opponent's effect would remove a Character with base cost ≤6. Needs proper condition.

Trigger 'Activated' is incorrect. Text states '[Opponent's Turn]' which indicates a static/conditional ability during opponent's turn, not an activated ability. Should be Trigger or StartOfTurn with DuringOpponentTurn duration.
Duration is 'EndOfTurn' but text says '[Opponent's Turn]' - effect applies during opponent's turn. Should be duration:'DuringOpponentTurn', not EndOfTurn. Violation of duration rule.
Target is 'AllOwnCharacters' but should be scoped to {Neptunian} type Characters only. Text specifies 'all of your {Neptunian} type Characters'.
Condition 'Always' is incorrect. Text requires 'you have no other [Shirahoshi] with a base cost of 2' - this is a specific conditional, not Always.
